name: Bertschi Center @ Mount Aloysius College
description: Bertschi Center @ Mount Aloysius College is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cresson, PA. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like water and restrooms. The courts are private.

name: Cresson Township Veterans Park
description: Cresson Township Veterans Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cresson, PA. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: The Mound
description: The Mound is a place to play pickleball in Johnstown, PA. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: The courts are open 7 days a week from dawn to dusk.  There is a pavilion to sit under at the pickleball courts as well.
